params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, face-up, nontoken creatures you control gain "When this creature dies, manifest the top card of your library."

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Until end of turn, face-up, nontoken creatures you control gain "When this creature dies, manifest the top card of your library."

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your end step, manifest the top card of your library. (Put it onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. Turn it face up any time for its mana cost if it's a creature card.)
